description: Grandfathered source files above their surface's nonblank-LOC cap (frontend: src/**.{ts,vue}; rust: src-tauri/**/src/**.rs — higher cap because unit tests live inline). Entries may shrink but not grow; new files above the cap are rejected. Regenerate with `npm run check:loc -- --update`.

src-tauri/src/transcription.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 1086->1178: transcription accuracy & speed increment (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-16-transcription-accuracy-and-speed-design.md) — initial_prompt_for (title+vocabulary prompt composition) and ensure_vad_model (Silero VAD resolve/download that degrades to no-VAD on failure rather than failing the job) orchestration helpers, wired into process_transcription, plus their unit tests. 1178->1179: final-review fix wave (Fix 1) — the stale "Handover" comment above set_phase(Preparing) now also names the silero model, since a VAD-enabled vault has resolved it by this point too; one extra wrapped line, no logic change. 1179->1180: use_gpu parameter + doc comment (GPU increment). 1180->1212: the (tier, use_gpu) cache key, needs_reload, and its unit test (GPU increment) — not the GPU config commands, which live in capture_config_commands.rs, not here. 1212->1215: final-review fix wave (G3) — process_transcription now reads config.json ONCE (app_cfg) feeding both the per-vault cfg and use_gpu, instead of calling load_config() twice; net +3 lines is the corrected comment explaining why one read is equally fresh, not new logic. 2026-07-16: +70 for the VAD download backoff (clock-free VadDownloadBackoff + ensure_vad_model wiring + regression test) — offline setups stalled every job through the network timeout (Codex PR #61). 2026-07-17: +79 for the model-purge slot (pending_purge + worker wait/drop integration + request/is-active helpers + queue tests) — Increment A delete-model support.

src-tauri/src/capture_commands.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 1211->1215: rename retarget on transcript-sidecar moves (Codex PR #46 round 4). 1215->1219: set_capture_config must also preserve the per-vault lists settings object (defaultList/listOrder, the tasks_folder preservation rule extended) — two fields + the invariant comment.

src-tauri/transcribe/src/lib.rs.reason: Crossed the 800 cap in the final whole-branch review's fix wave (Fix 1): the Transcriber trait's transcribe() now returns (Vec<Segment>, bool) for vad_engaged (see src-tauri/transcribe/src/vad.rs, the reimplemented VAD filter/remap — whisper-rs 0.16's FullParams VAD setters turned out to be dead on the whisper_full_with_state call path) — the trait doc comment, TranscriptMeta.vad wiring, the FakeOkVad fixture + its sidecar test, and the engine_options_reach_the_transcriber triple assert (language/prompt/vad) account for most of the growth; a smaller slice is Fix 3's compose_initial_prompt control-character stripping + test. Splitting the crate's one orchestration/test file is a bigger change than this review-driven fix wave warrants. Shrink only; split when next touched. 815->829: compose_initial_prompt now MAPS control characters to spaces instead of deleting them — deletion glued newline-separated vocabulary terms together (`"Anna\nKubernetes"` -> `"AnnaKubernetes"`), defeating the exact tokens the prompt exists to prime, while still keeping NUL and friends out of the CString whisper-rs builds internally (a NUL surviving into the prompt panics the transcription worker thread) — the doc-comment update plus the widened test covering the newline case account for the growth. 829->880: cancel-correctness regression fix (Codex PR #61 P2) — a cancel landing during a successful engine return (the VAD detect stage has no abort callback) is now honored in transcribe_recording even on Ok, plus its regression test and fake. +prompt cap (PROMPT_MAX_CHARS, Codex PR #61) and its tests. 2026-07-16: +30 for the EngineOutput struct refactor (multi-line struct literals replacing tuples at seven construction sites; zero new logic). 2026-07-16: +66 for detected-language threading (pipeline re-filter on the setting, FakeDetects fake + auto-vs-pinned sidecar test).

src-tauri/capture/src/session.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/transcribe/src/model.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 846->938: transcription accuracy & speed increment (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-16-transcription-accuracy-and-speed-design.md) — the ModelTier::Turbo (large-v3-turbo-q5_0) tier variant and the pinned Silero VAD model artifact (vad_model_path + download_vad_model, same pinned-URL/SHA-256/.part-then-rename discipline as the speech tiers), plus their tests. 2026-07-17: +105 for the artifact registry (ModelArtifact/model_artifacts/ArtifactStatus/list_artifacts_in + coverage/part-file tests) — Increment A models management; rustfmt block-expands the five artifact literals.

src-tauri/core/src/services.rs.reason: Crossed the 800 cap adding the tasks-root containment guard in add_task (a list symlinked/junctioned outside the tasks root would accept the write but hide the task from the walkers) plus its symlink-escape regression test (Codex PR #53 re-review). 821->857: hardened that guard to validate the list dir against the resolved root BEFORE create_dir_all, so an escaping (incl. nested-through-a-link) list is rejected before a stray folder is mkdir'd outside the root, plus its nested-escape regression test. 857->927: a configured DEFAULT list that escapes the root now degrades to the tasks root instead of erroring every unpicked add (the read-lenient posture), plus its degrade regression test. The services layer already holds vault/tasks/recordings functions over one ServicePaths; splitting it into per-domain modules is a separate refactor. Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/capture_paths.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 835->854: +capture_dir (flat/dated recording-layout helper, beside dated_folder) + its test; splitting this file is disproportionate for the addition. 854->886: transcription accuracy & speed increment (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-16-transcription-accuracy-and-speed-design.md) — +capture_title (strips the capture-name date/time prefix for initial-prompt priming, beside is_capture_base) + its tests.

src-tauri/core/src/vault_config.rs.reason: Crossed the 800 cap when two concurrent increments' per-vault config fields landed in the same merge: the transcription accuracy & speed increment (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-16-transcription-accuracy-and-speed-design.md) added `transcription_vocabulary`/`transcription_vad` — fields, Default entries, vault_entry parse branches, serialize_vault_entry branches, and their tests — and the document-import images-vs-text-only toggle (PR #60, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-16-document-import-image-text-toggle-design.md, merged from main) added `document_extract_images` the same way. Splitting the per-field defensive parse/serialize module (vault_entry/serialize_vault_entry) out from the struct+defaults is the follow-up when next touched. Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/transcript.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 2026-07-16: +21 for detected-language (field + frontmatter/stats rendering + render test) — Increment A, honest auto-detection reporting. +11 defense-in-depth parity for the frontmatter gate (H2 review M1) with pinned+detected render assertions.

src/stores/capture.ts.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src/components/Tasks.vue.reason: The Tasks view (the codebase's churn hotspot per fallow) crossed the 500 cap under a run of Codex PR #53 re-review guards — the empty-list visibility fix (hasDisplayableLists + the buckets/empty-state split) and the Lists-grouping filter no-match fix (filterActive gating includeEmpty). It is already split into useTaskActions/useTaskLists/useTaskReorder composables + the taskSort/taskSections/taskOrder utils; extracting the grouping/display-state (buckets + its helpers) into a composable is the next split. Shrink only; split when next touched.
